data.title: RED test: SC13 restart analysis script computes drop vs Story 1 baseline
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Write `test_sc13_analysis_computes_drop` BEFORE implementing the SC13 script.

Given: sc13-restart-analysis.sh not yet implemented
When: test checks for script existence
Then: RED failure (script absent)

## Test Approach
Given: analysis script absent
When: test attempts to invoke `plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh`
Then: "not found" error → RED failure

## Implementation Notes
Create `tests/scripts/test-sc13-restart-analysis.sh` that:
1. Verifies `plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh` exists and is executable
2. Runs with synthetic baseline data: --baseline-restart-rate=0.45 --post-epic-restart-rate=0.30
3. Asserts output contains `RESTART_DROP_PCT:` line with value ~33.3%
4. Asserts output contains `METHODOLOGY:` section
5. Asserts output contains confidence interval mention
6. Does NOT assert specific values — only structural completeness

Update `.test-index`:
`plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh: tests/scripts/test-sc13-restart-analysis.sh [test_sc13_analysis_computes_drop]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sc13-restart-analysis.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present
  Verify: grep '\[test_sc13_analysis_computes_drop\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test fails RED before T13 implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sc13-restart-analysis.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
